name: caliber
description: Caliber: AI Business Agents. 24 AI agents that take you from idea to shipped product. Validate > Build > Launch + Craft, Document, Present, Demo.

plugins.name: validate
plugins.description: Validate business ideas with 3 AI experts: Value Mapper, Business Modeler, Experiment Designer

plugins.name: build
plugins.description: Build product strategy with 5 AI experts: Product Strategist, Brand Strategist, Growth Designer, Spec Writer, Product Designer

plugins.name: launch
plugins.description: Go-to-market with 7 AI experts: Offer Designer, Copywriter, Funnel Architect, Growth Auditor, Media Planner, SEO Strategist, AI Search Optimizer

plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: Build production deliverables with 4 AI agents: Landing Page Builder, MVP Scaffolder, Component Designer, Tester

plugins.name: document
plugins.description: Generate professional business documents with 2 AI agents: Business Writer, Pitch Deck Writer

plugins.name: present
plugins.description: Create slide presentations with 1 AI agent: Slide Designer (Marp markdown to PDF/PPTX)

plugins.name: demo
plugins.description: Produce product demo videos with 2 AI agents: Demo Producer (Playwright+ElevenLabs+Remotion), Clip Maker

plugins.name: pipeline
plugins.description: Pipeline controller that chains validate > build > launch into automated workflow with Stop hook loop pattern
